title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
